name: quick_copy_patient_info
description: Adds a 'Patient Info' custom section pinned to the top of the patient chart summary with one-click copy buttons for the patient's name, date of birth, primary phone number, and home address.

handlers.description: Registers the 'Patient Info' custom section in the patient chart summary.
Renders the 'Patient Info' summary card with copy buttons for name, DOB, phone, and address.
